subcodes.first_line: O steadfast one in the Covenant! Thy letter had long since been received, but no opportunity was found to reply. Now, at the break of dawn [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت پیمان نامه شما مدتی بود که واصل شده بود ولی فرصت جواب نبود حال دم صبح
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @growth of the Cause
